paragraphs.text: Short answer: SRD‑46 does not report electrode (redox) potentials, and a search of its citation records found no entries for the Cu²⁺/Cu⁰ couple. SRD‑46 focuses on ligand–metal stability constants and ligand pKa values, not standard potentials.

claims.text: SRD‑46 does not report electrode (redox) potentials
a search of its citation records found no entries for the Cu²⁺/Cu⁰ couple.
SRD‑46 focuses on ligand–metal stability constants and ligand pKa values, not standard potentials.

tool_snippets.snippet:
WHERE (citation LIKE '%copper%' OR citation LIKE '%Cu(II)%' OR citation LIKE '%Cu2%')
  AND (citation LIKE '%electrode%' OR citation LIKE '%standard potential%' OR citation LIKE '%redox potential%' OR citation LIKE '%SHE%')
LIMIT 50;

*(no results)*

FROM ref_literature
WHERE (paper_name LIKE '%electrode%' OR paper_name LIKE '%standard potential%' OR paper_name LIKE '%redox%')
  AND (paper_name LIKE '%copper%' OR paper_name LIKE '%Cu%')
LIMIT 50;

*(no results)*

tool_snippets.snippet:
SELECT literature_alt_id, shortcut, citation
FROM ref_literature_alt
WHERE (citation LIKE '%copper%' OR citation LIKE '%Cu(II)%' OR citation LIKE '%Cu2%')
  AND (citation LIKE '%electrode%' OR ... '%standard potential%' ... '%redox potential%' ... '%SHE%')
*(no results)*

SELECT literature_id, year, paper_name
FROM ref_literature
WHERE (paper_name LIKE '%electrode%' OR ... '%standard potential%' OR ... '%redox%')
  AND (paper_name LIKE '%copper%' OR paper_name LIKE '%Cu%')
*(no results)*
